candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line and matches Net sales exactly in the preview; suitable as top-line revenue.
Also a valid revenue label; same values as Total Revenue, so useful as fallback/alternate label across years.

variables.notes: Using candidate revenue labels as a priority list; later code can take the first non-missing value.

No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales line is present on the Income Statement. Rows such as 'Other external costs' are not clearly direct production/service costs and may reflect broader operating expenses, so they are not selected.

candidates.why: Clear operating overhead component and preferred SG&A-type bucket.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A row exists. Added overhead-like component rows from the full A-column preview to improve coverage, but 'Other external costs' is somewhat ambiguous and may include non-SG&A items depending on company reporting. Outside-candidate selection was necessary because the candidate list appears incomplete for SG&A components. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other operatings expenses, [Income Statement] Other external costs

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related, but this is amortization rather than current-period R&D expense, so less preferred.
Explicit R&D expense line; best match for XRD.
Balance sheet asset, not an income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet gross asset line, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Participations in development projects - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset line, not current R&D expense.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

variables.notes: Using the explicit R&D expense line first, with the amortization-related R&D label only as a fallback priority item if reporting changes across years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest-related, but only a narrow subcomponent of total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense and similar income statement items
candidates.why: Best single reported line for interest expense / finance cost.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense and similar income statement items
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list uses the broad interest expense line first, then the lease-interest supplemental line as fallback if labels change.

candidates.why: Valid total equity line, but a better owner-only equity line exists.
Not equity; total balance sheet total, so not appropriate for BE.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Selected 'Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders' because BE should exclude non-controlling interests when possible. This better label exists in the preview but was missing from the candidate list, so manual review is flagged. 'Total Equity' is retained only as fallback. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
No minority interest / non-controlling interests line is present on the Balance Sheet preview.
